identity.mission: Building autonomous lead generation systems for B2B founders.
identity.visual_mood: Dark Minimal, Grid-Based, High Contrast, No Fluff

layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid (Use CSS Grid with col-span adjustments)
layout_strategy.mobile_first: Single column on mobile, 3-4 columns on desktop

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 hover:border-zinc-600 rounded-full px-8 py-6 transition-all

cards.style: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-all rounded-xl p-8 backdrop-blur-sm
cards.effect: Subtle inner glow or spotlight effect on hover

inputs.style: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:border-white/20 focus:ring-0 rounded-lg h-12

visual_enhancers.background_texture: Radial gradient at top center: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 0%, transparent 50%)
visual_enhancers.grid_lines: Fixed background grid pattern: linear-gradient(to right, #27272a 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #27272a 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 4rem 4rem; mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black, transparent 80%)
visual_enhancers.animations: Fade-in up for sections, marquee for logos, subtle pulse for 'live' status

elements: H1: 'Automate your entire B2B Lead Gen system'
Subtext: 'Stop manual prospecting. I build autonomous AI agents that book meetings while you sleep.'

pain_points.title: Is this you?
pain_points.style: 3-column grid of simple text cards. Highlight keywords in white.

process.style: Vertical timeline or numbered step cards connected by a subtle line.

images.description: Abstract green light trails for hero background (use with overlay)
Blue/Green network balls for 'How it works' section

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Force dark mode. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The brand is strictly dark.
3. FONTS: Import 'Outfit' and 'Inter' from Google Fonts in index.css.
4. LOGOS: If a logo URL fails, render the text name in 'Outfit' font with a subtle border box.
5. GRID: Use 'bento-grid' style for the Services/Results section. Vary col-spans (1 vs 2).
6. CTA: The main CTA is 'Book a Call' -> link to 'https://cal.com/aryantn01/30min'.
7. FOOTER: Include links to LinkedIn ('https://www.linkedin.com/in/aryan-tn/') and Email ('aryantn01@gmail.com').
8. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast is high (gray-200/gray-400) against the black background.
9. NO PURPLE: Do not use purple gradients. Stick to Monochrome/Zinc/White with Green/Blue accents only for success indicators.
10. TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
